home.title: My 5 Swings
home.subtitle: The five things that, if you did them relentlessly every week, would make you successful.
home.firstTime: First time here? Choose Enter My 5 to create your account and set your PIN.

enter.title: Enter My 5
enter.emailHelp: We'll use this to send you your 5 Swings.
enter.pinHelp: You'll use this with your last name to edit or view your 5 later.
enter.swingsSubtitle: The five broad categories of work your role exists to own. Not a to-do list — the things you give your week to.
enter.duplicateLastName: A staff member with that last name already exists. Please contact Pastor Josh to resolve.

edit.title: Edit My 5
edit.error: We couldn't find that combination. Try again or contact Pastor Josh.
edit.modeTitle: How would you like to save this edit?
edit.updateModeHelp: Edit your current 5 in place without creating a history entry.
edit.versionModeHelp: Archive your current 5 and save this as a fresh version in your history.
